# P attribute: custom staleness program determines if target is out of date.
# The program receives (target, prereq) and exits non-zero if out of date.
cp target target
cp dep dep
# Our custom program always says "out of date" (exit 1)
mk -p 1 -f mkfile target
stdout 'rebuilding'

-- mkfile --
target:Psh -c 'exit 1': dep
	echo rebuilding
-- target --
content
-- dep --
content
